mapper.sql: id, class_period, head_teacher_id, campus_id, course_id, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into sys_class (class_period, head_teacher_id, campus_id, course_id, created_at, updated_at) values (#{classPeriod}, #{headTeacherId}, #{campusId}, #{courseId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update sys_class set class_period = #{classPeriod}, head_teacher_id = #{headTeacherId}, campus_id = #{campusId}, course_id = #{courseId}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
